notes: Clean V3 menu core is introduced as the main menu renderer through clean-v3-menu-core-db.js.
Menu structure is stored in PostgreSQL tables ak_menu_nodes_v3, ak_menu_events_v3 and ak_menu_session_v3.
Code keeps stable route keys and order; titles, body text, visibility, dynamic kind and metadata live in DB.
Every menu render and callback is logged to ak_menu_events_v3.
OpenApp comments launch remains unchanged and is kept as the correct baseline.
Comments module itself is not rewritten in this build.
